data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of keeping conflict detection enabled while restricting event details.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to keep conflict detection enabled while restricting event details, but the prior evidence does not provide any specific checks or configurations that confirm this capability. While there are successful steps related to bookings and member interactions, none demonstrate the enforcement of different access levels or conflict detection mechanisms as required by the use case. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of conflict detection mechanisms while restricting event details.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to keep conflict detection enabled while restricting event details.
